description.BannerD3DemonHunter: The demon hunters are neither a people, nor a nation. Instead, they are survivors bound by vengeance.
description.BannerD3DemonHunterRare: Only a hunter whose hatred is fully tempered by discipline will ever bear the sigil of the Order-masters.
description.BannerD3DemonHunterRareVar1: Only a hunter whose hatred is fully tempered by discipline will ever bear the sigil of the Order-masters.
description.BannerD3DemonHunterRareVar2: Only a hunter whose hatred is fully tempered by discipline will ever bear the sigil of the Order-masters.
description.BannerD3DemonHunterVar1: The demon hunters are neither a people, nor a nation. Instead, they are survivors bound by vengeance.
description.BannerD3DemonHunterVar2: The demon hunters are neither a people, nor a nation. Instead, they are survivors bound by vengeance.
description.BannerD3WitchDoctor: The totems of the Tribe of the Five Hills serve as both markers and as powerful mojos.
description.BannerD3WitchDoctorRare: A Witch Doctor's mask clouds their identity, presenting them as an aspect of the spirits.
description.BannerD3WitchDoctorRareVar1: A Witch Doctor's mask clouds their identity, presenting them as an aspect of the spirits.
description.BannerD3WitchDoctorRareVar2: A Witch Doctor's mask clouds their identity, presenting them as an aspect of the spirits.
description.BannerD3WitchDoctorVar1: The totems of the Tribe of the Five Hills serve as both markers and as powerful mojos.
description.BannerD3WitchDoctorVar2: The totems of the Tribe of the Five Hills serve as both markers and as powerful mojos.
description.BannerD3Wizard: Banner of the rebellious students of the Yshari Sanctum who proudly bear the name Wizard.
description.BannerD3WizardRare: The full power of the wizards is so great that the earth itself trembles at their machinations.
description.BannerD3WizardRareVar1: The full power of the wizards is so great that the earth itself trembles at their machinations.
description.BannerD3WizardRareVar2: The full power of the wizards is so great that the earth itself trembles at their machinations.
description.BannerD3WizardVar1: Banner of the rebellious students of the Yshari Sanctum who proudly bear the name Wizard.
description.BannerD3WizardVar2: Banner of the rebellious students of the Yshari Sanctum who proudly bear the name Wizard.
description.BannerDF3YearAnniversary: It's been three years already? Where does the time go? ...Huh? Oh, right, we were doing a thing... here's a banner!
description.BannerDF4YearAnniversary: It's been four years already? Where does the time go? ...Huh? Oh, right, we were doing a thing... here's a banner!
description.BannerDF5YearAnniversary: It's been five years already? Where does the time go? ...Huh? Oh, right, we were doing a thing... here's a banner!
description.BannerDF65YearAnniversary: It's been six and a half years already? Where does the time go? ...Huh? Oh, right, we were doing a thing... here's a banner!
description.BannerDF6YearAnniversaryGold: It's been six years already? Where does the time go? ...Huh? Oh, right, we were doing a thing... here's a banner!
description.BannerDF6YearAnniversaryPurple: It's been six years already? Where does the time go? ...Huh? Oh, right, we were doing a thing... here's a banner!
description.BannerDFBlizzcon2017: A memento from a time and place where heroes converge for glory and celebration. Released in commemoration of BlizzCon 2017.
description.BannerDFBlizzcon2018: A memento from a time and place where heroes converge for glory and celebration. Released in commemoration of BlizzCon 2018.
description.BannerDFCommunity65Base: It's an all right banner, but it'd be better with comeback mechanics.
description.BannerDFCommunity65Rare: In the Nexus, the unexpected happens regularly. When it does, you own it, celebrate it, and let people plant flags all over your battlegrounds with it.
description.BannerDFEsportsChess: In games of strategy, sometimes the winning move is to watch and learn.

description.BannerDFGhostSpooky18: The Spectral Wyrm's crest serves as a cold reminder that, in the Nexus, one can never truly escape the clutches of death.
description.BannerDFGhostSpooky18Var1: The Spectral Wyrm's crest serves as a cold reminder that, in the Nexus, one can never truly escape the clutches of death.
description.BannerDFGhostSpooky18Var2: The Spectral Wyrm's crest serves as a cold reminder that, in the Nexus, one can never truly escape the clutches of death.
description.BannerDFGhostSpooky18Var3: The Spectral Wyrm's crest serves as a cold reminder that, in the Nexus, one can never truly escape the clutches of death.
description.BannerDFGhostSpooky18Var4: The Spectral Wyrm's crest serves as a cold reminder that, in the Nexus, one can never truly escape the clutches of death.
description.BannerDFHallowsEndPumpkin: Observed by both the Alliance and the Horde, Hallow's End is a time to honor the spirits of the dead and unburden the souls of the living.
description.BannerDFHGC2018Finals: Adorn the battlefields of the Nexus with the banner of the 2018 HGC Finals Champions, Gen.G.
description.BannerDFLunar2018: The Lunar Festival reminds us that before embarking on a new year of adventure, it's important to take the time to honor the past.
description.BannerDFSecondBday: You could say we've had a banner year. Now, you can have one too.
description.BannerDFSpooky18: Once the crest of the rulers of Raven Court, these banners now solely represent the Raven Lord's declaration of war upon King's Crest.
description.BannerDFSpooky18Var1: Once the crest of the rulers of Raven Court, these banners now solely represent the Raven Lord's declaration of war upon King's Crest.
description.BannerDFSpooky18Var2: Once the crest of the rulers of Raven Court, these banners now solely represent the Raven Lord's declaration of war upon King's Crest.
description.BannerDFSpooky18Var3: Once the crest of the rulers of Raven Court, these banners now solely represent the Raven Lord's declaration of war upon King's Crest.
description.BannerDFSpooky18Var4: Once the crest of the rulers of Raven Court, these banners now solely represent the Raven Lord's declaration of war upon King's Crest.
description.BannerDFTespa2018: Awarded to the Heroes of the Dorm and those who support them.
description.BannerDFToys18Dehaka: Dominate your territory like a true Dehakasaur and reestablish your primal kingdom within the Nexus!
description.BannerDFToys18Stitches: The idea of a Funland Warcrest would have been preposterous once... but that was before the Cuddle Bear's jealous ambitions.
description.BannerDFToys18Valeera: "Never again, Zarthoth! This star system is under the protection of the Cosmic Force!" - Cosmic Force Valeera, Episode 03: "The Endless Midnight"
description.BannerDFWCAVAlliance: When the call to defend the Nexus from the Raven Lord's aggression was issued, the Alliance of Lordaeron answered without hesitation.
description.BannerDFWCAVHorde: With the blessings of the Raven Spirit, Drek'Thar and the Horde would ensure the Alliance would never encroach upon Frostwolf land again.
description.BannerDFWinterveil2017: As the seasons change and winter blankets Azeroth, communities gather for feasting and merriment, sharing what they have with one another.
description.BannerDFWitchSpooky18: The Witch of the Hollows and the Spider Warden make for strange allies... Only the Raven Lord himself could forge such a terrifying union.
description.BannerDFWitchSpooky18Var1: The Witch of the Hollows and the Spider Warden make for strange allies... Only the Raven Lord himself could forge such a terrifying union.
description.BannerDFWitchSpooky18Var2: The Witch of the Hollows and the Spider Warden make for strange allies... Only the Raven Lord himself could forge such a terrifying union.
description.BannerDFWitchSpooky18Var3: The Witch of the Hollows and the Spider Warden make for strange allies... Only the Raven Lord himself could forge such a terrifying union.
description.BannerDFWitchSpooky18Var4: The Witch of the Hollows and the Spider Warden make for strange allies... Only the Raven Lord himself could forge such a terrifying union.
description.BannerOWDVaIconic: MEKA pilots are recruited for their incredible dexterity and multi-tasking skills. Personal branding is just a plus.
description.BannerOWDVaIconicRare: Hana Song's talent has made her a world champion on both digital battlefields and physical ones.
description.BannerOWDVaPolice: A banner drawn into the Nexus from another world. Granted to those who overcome the Nexus's challenge.
description.BannerOWDVaSimple: MEKA pilots are recruited for their incredible dexterity and multi-tasking skills. Personal branding is just a plus.
description.BannerOWDVaSimpleRare: Hana Song's talent has made her a world champion on both digital battlefields and physical ones.
description.BannerOWGenjiIconic: Genji found inner peace only through diligent training and meditation. It has made him stronger than he ever was before.
description.BannerOWGenjiIconicRare: Having accepted his existence as both man and machine, Genji now faces his challenges with a clear mind and a resolute spirit.
description.BannerOWGenjiOni: The oni are often seen as symbols of chaos and disaster. Genji simply chooses who to inflict disaster upon.
description.BannerOWGenjiSimple: Genji found inner peace only through diligent training and meditation. It has made him stronger than he ever was before.
description.BannerOWGenjiSimpleRare: Having accepted his existence as both man and machine, Genji now faces his challenges with a clear mind and a resolute spirit.
description.BannerOWLogoIconic: Soldiers. Scientists. Adventurers. Oddities. Overwatch was the guardian of global peace for a generation.
description.BannerOWLogoIconicRare: Although their watch has ended, Overwatch's soaring ideals of freedom and equality will never be forgotten.
description.BannerOWLogoSimple: Soldiers. Scientists. Adventurers. Oddities. Overwatch was the guardian of global peace for a generation.
description.BannerOWLogoSimpleRare: Although their watch has ended, Overwatch's soaring ideals of freedom and equality will never be forgotten.
description.BannerOWPachimari: The perfect symbol to strike fear into the hearts of your enemies.
description.BannerOWTracerIconic: Tracer's ability to speed up or slow down her own time made her one of Overwatch's most effective agents.
description.BannerOWTracerIconicRare: Despite Overwatch's dissolution, Tracer continues to fight the good fight wherever she can.
description.BannerOWTracerSimple: Tracer's ability to speed up or slow down her own time made her one of Overwatch's most effective agents.
description.BannerOWTracerSimpleRare: Despite Overwatch's dissolution, Tracer continues to fight the good fight wherever she can.
description.BannerSCProtoss: Though they have lost the Khala, the protoss have found a greater sense of unity than they have ever known before.
description.BannerSCProtossRare: Few can withstand the full might of the firstborn. Where the Golden Armada goes, victory follows.
description.BannerSCProtossRareVar1: Few can withstand the full might of the firstborn. Where the Golden Armada goes, victory follows.
description.BannerSCProtossRareVar2: Few can withstand the full might of the firstborn. Where the Golden Armada goes, victory follows.
description.BannerSCProtossVar1: Though they have lost the Khala, the protoss have found a greater sense of unity than they have ever known before.
description.BannerSCProtossVar2: Though they have lost the Khala, the protoss have found a greater sense of unity than they have ever known before.
description.BannerSCTerran: Though relatively new to the Koprulu Sector, the terrans have played a significant role in shaping its destiny.
description.BannerSCTerranRare: Terrans are ingenious and industrious. If they ever united under one banner, they just might be unstoppable.
description.BannerSCTerranRareVar1: Terrans are ingenious and industrious. If they ever united under one banner, they just might be unstoppable.
description.BannerSCTerranRareVar2: Terrans are ingenious and industrious. If they ever united under one banner, they just might be unstoppable.
description.BannerSCTerranVar1: Though relatively new to the Koprulu Sector, the terrans have played a significant role in shaping its destiny.
description.BannerSCTerranVar2: Though relatively new to the Koprulu Sector, the terrans have played a significant role in shaping its destiny.
description.BannerSCZerg: The zerg are the scourge of the sector, relentlessly infesting and assimilating any advanced species in their path.
description.BannerSCZergRare: From their humble beginnings on Zerus, the zerg have evolved into one of the most terrifying forces in the galaxy.
description.BannerSCZergRareVar1: From their humble beginnings on Zerus, the zerg have evolved into one of the most terrifying forces in the galaxy.
description.BannerSCZergRareVar2: From their humble beginnings on Zerus, the zerg have evolved into one of the most terrifying forces in the galaxy.
description.BannerSCZergVar1: The zerg are the scourge of the sector, relentlessly infesting and assimilating any advanced species in their path.
description.BannerSCZergVar2: The zerg are the scourge of the sector, relentlessly infesting and assimilating any advanced species in their path.
description.BannerWCAlliance: Champions of order and justice, the heroes of the Alliance bring light to the darkest corners of Azeroth.
description.BannerWCAllianceRare: Kings may die, and kingdoms may fall, but the Alliance will never be broken. For the Alliance!
description.BannerWCAllianceRareVar1: Kings may die, and kingdoms may fall, but the Alliance will never be broken. For the Alliance!
description.BannerWCAllianceVar1: Champions of order and justice, the heroes of the Alliance bring light to the darkest corners of Azeroth.
description.BannerWCDwarf: There's nothing a dwarf loves more than a good brew in a warm tavern. Except perhaps the tavern brawl that follows.
description.BannerWCDwarfRare: Descended from creations of the titans, the dwarves are heirs to great and mysterious fonts of power.
description.BannerWCDwarfRareVar1: Descended from creations of the titans, the dwarves are heirs to great and mysterious fonts of power.
description.BannerWCDwarfVar1: There's nothing a dwarf loves more than a good brew in a warm tavern. Except perhaps the tavern brawl that follows.
description.BannerWCHorde: Forged from the misunderstood and outcast races of Azeroth, the Horde values strength and honor above all else.
description.BannerWCHordeRare: The Horde's history is rife with struggle and turmoil, but its flame will never be extinguished. For the Horde!
description.BannerWCHordeRareVar1: The Horde's history is rife with struggle and turmoil, but its flame will never be extinguished. For the Horde!
description.BannerWCHordeVar1: Forged from the misunderstood and outcast races of Azeroth, the Horde values strength and honor above all else.
description.BannerWCKelThuzad: Naxxramas has long served as an emblem of Scourge dominance. It is only fitting it continues to do so in the Nexus.
description.BannerWCNightElf: The night elves are an ancient and mystical race, bound to nature and the light of Elune.
description.BannerWCNightElfRare: Whether they fight with blade, spell, or beast, the heroes of the kaldorei are among Azeroth's fiercest guardians.
description.BannerWCNightElfRareVar1: Whether they fight with blade, spell, or beast, the heroes of the kaldorei are among Azeroth's fiercest guardians.
description.BannerWCNightElfVar1: The night elves are an ancient and mystical race, bound to nature and the light of Elune.
description.BannerWCTauren: The wise and noble tauren are a peaceful people, but will not hesitate to fight when the land is in danger.
description.BannerWCTaurenRare: The greatest heroes of the shu'halo prove themselves not only in battle, but in sage counsel as well.
description.BannerWCTaurenRareVar1: The greatest heroes of the shu'halo prove themselves not only in battle, but in sage counsel as well.
description.BannerWCTaurenVar1: The wise and noble tauren are a peaceful people, but will not hesitate to fight when the land is in danger.

infoText.BannerDFSpooky18Var4: The Spectral Wyrm's crest serves as a cold reminder that, in the Nexus, one can never truly escape the clutches of death.
infoText.BannerDFWitchSpooky18: The Witch of the Hollows and the Spider Warden make for strange allies... Only the Raven Lord himself could forge such a terrifying union.
